ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder to use for saving book highlight notes. Default directory is 'Apple Books Highlights'. WARNING: this folder and all its contents will be deleted on every sync! Use a dedicated folder for this plugin, and do not edit the notes it creates.
ast.target: 用于保存书籍高亮笔记的保险库文件夹。默认目录为 'Apple Books Highlights'。警告：此文件夹及其所有内容将在每次同步时被删除！请为此插件使用专用文件夹，并且不要编辑它创建的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sync Apple Books highlights when Obsidian starts
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动同步 Apple Books 高亮内容

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error in Apple Books Highlight Sync:
ast.target: Apple Books 高亮同步出错：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Annotation Database not found, cannot sync.
ast.target: 未找到 Apple Books 注解数据库，无法同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Books Database not found, cannot sync.
ast.target: 未找到 Apple Books 书籍数据库，无法同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Successfully finished Apple Books Highlight Sync
ast.target: Apple Books 高亮同步成功完成
